Description.SourceString: Few metals are as beloved as gold. Its glistening nature has attracted countless pursuers, and those who find a viable vein need never work again. Sadly, on Ashenfall, the economy is not quite so well established and gold is merely another crafting component. Still, remember where you found it, because once all this dragon malarky is dealt with you might make a tidy sum selling the location to prospectors.
